message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9CC
  NoteBorderColor #666666
}

actor User as U
participant Application as A #E6E6F2
participant "«engine»\nAuto SDK Engine" as E #8FD3FF
participant "«avs»\nAlexa" as X #C9FFC9

note over A
"Turn off AC"
end note

U -> X : 
activate E
X -> E : PowerController.TurnOff directive
E -> A : Receive SetPowerControllerValue message
A -> A : Turn off AC
A -> E : Publish SetControllerValueMessage Reply
E -> X : Alexa.Response event
deactivate E

note over X
SpeechSynthesizer.Speak directive
«Alexa speech response»
end note

X -> A : 
@enduml
```
